dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio — where the good times ROLL! That was Harry Styles - Watermelon Sugar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover / Bardcore]. Next up, something completely different — just kidding, it's Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Theme - [Medieval Ninja Style? - Sort of - Cover / Bardcore]. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: EXTREME VOLUME RADIO FROM THE SCREAMING DIMENSION! IF YOU CAN'T HEAR THIS, YOUR REALITY IS TOO QUIET!
hijack_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
